metadata.name: amazon_selling_partner__item_inventory
metadata.comment: Table containing current inventory levels pertaining to individual Amazon catalog items, enhanced with all product descriptors and identifiers, listing metadata, item dimensions, and sales ranks.

marketplace_id.name: marketplace_id
marketplace_id.comment: The unobfuscated marketplace identifier. Different marketplace values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/marketplace-ids).

asin.name: asin
asin.comment: The item's Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN).

item_name.name: item_name
item_name.comment: Name, or title, associated with an Amazon catalog item.

product_name.name: product_name
product_name.comment: The localized language product title of the item within the specific marketplace.

brand.name: brand
brand.comment: Name of the brand associated with an Amazon catalog item.

color.name: color
color.comment: Name of the color associated with an Amazon catalog item.

size.name: size
size.comment: Name of the size associated with an Amazon catalog item.

style.name: style
style.comment: Name of the style associated with an Amazon catalog item.

package_quantity.name: package_quantity
package_quantity.comment: Quantity of an Amazon catalog item in one package.

manufacturer.name: manufacturer
manufacturer.comment: Name of the manufacturer associated with an Amazon catalog item.

contributors.name: contributors
contributors.comment: Individual contributors to the creation of an item, such as the authors or actors.

product_type.name: product_type
product_type.comment: Name of the product type associated with the Amazon catalog item.

condition.name: condition
condition.comment: The condition of the item as described by the seller (for example, New Item).

release_date.name: release_date
release_date.comment: First date on which an Amazon catalog item is shippable to customers.

item_classification.name: item_classification
item_classification.comment: Classification type associated with the Amazon catalog item. Possible values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/catalog-items-api-v2022-04-01-reference#itemclassification).

classification_id.name: classification_id
classification_id.comment: Identifier of the classification associated with the sales rank.

classification_sales_rank_link.name: classification_sales_rank_link
classification_sales_rank_link.comment: Corresponding Amazon retail website link, or URL, for the sales rank.

website_display_group.name: website_display_group
website_display_group.comment: Identifier of the website display group associated with an Amazon catalog item.

website_display_group_name.name: website_display_group_name
website_display_group_name.comment: Display name of the website display group associated with an Amazon catalog item.

website_display_group_sales_rank_link.name: website_display_group_sales_rank_link
website_display_group_sales_rank_link.comment: Corresponding Amazon retail website link, or URL, for the sales rank.

is_memorabilia.name: is_memorabilia
is_memorabilia.comment: Identifies an Amazon catalog item is memorabilia valued for its connection with historical events, culture, or entertainment.

is_adult_product.name: is_adult_product
is_adult_product.comment: Identifies an Amazon catalog item is intended for an adult audience or is sexual in nature.

is_autographed.name: is_autographed
is_autographed.comment: Identifies an Amazon catalog item is autographed by a player or celebrity.

is_trade_in_eligible.name: is_trade_in_eligible
is_trade_in_eligible.comment: Identifies an Amazon catalog item is eligible for trade-in.

model_number.name: model_number
model_number.comment: Model number associated with an Amazon catalog item.

part_number.name: part_number
part_number.comment: Part number associated with an Amazon catalog item.

parent_variation_asin.name: parent_variation_asin
parent_variation_asin.comment: Identifier (ASIN) of the item's variation parent.

parent_package_container_asin.name: parent_package_container_asin
parent_package_container_asin.comment: Identifier (ASIN) of the item's package container parent.

sku.name: sku
sku.comment: Stock Keeping Unit, a seller-specified identifier for an Amazon listed item.

ean.name: ean
ean.comment: European Article Number of the catalog item.

gtin.name: gtin
gtin.comment: Global Trade Item Number of the catalog item.

isbn.name: isbn
isbn.comment: International Standard Book Number of the catalog item.

jan.name: jan
jan.comment: Japanese Article Number of the catalog item.

minsan.name: minsan
minsan.comment: Minsan Code of the catalog item.

upc.name: upc
upc.comment: Universal Product Code of the catalog item.

count_images.name: count_images
count_images.comment: Count of images for an item in the Amazon catalog for the indicated Amazon marketplace.

count_swatch_images.name: count_swatch_images
count_swatch_images.comment: Count of Swatch images for this item.

item_height_unit.name: item_height_unit
item_height_unit.comment: Measurement unit of the dimension value.

item_length_unit.name: item_length_unit
item_length_unit.comment: Measurement unit of the dimension value.

item_weight_unit.name: item_weight_unit
item_weight_unit.comment: Measurement unit of the dimension value.

item_width_unit.name: item_width_unit
item_width_unit.comment: Measurement unit of the dimension value.

package_height_unit.name: package_height_unit
package_height_unit.comment: Measurement unit of the dimension value.

package_length_unit.name: package_length_unit
package_length_unit.comment: Measurement unit of the dimension value.

package_weight_unit.name: package_weight_unit
package_weight_unit.comment: Measurement unit of the dimension value.

package_width_unit.name: package_width_unit
package_width_unit.comment: Measurement unit of the dimension value.

inventory_summary_id.name: inventory_summary_id
inventory_summary_id.comment: Fivetran-generated Primary Key for inventory summaries.

inventory_last_updated_at.name: inventory_last_updated_at
inventory_last_updated_at.comment: The date and time that any quantity was last updated.

total_quantity.name: total_quantity
total_quantity.comment: The total number of units in an inbound shipment or in Amazon fulfillment centers.

total_researching_quantity.name: total_researching_quantity
total_researching_quantity.comment: The total number of units in Amazon's fulfillment network that are currently being picked, packed, and shipped; or are sidelined for measurement, sampling, or other internal processes.

total_reserved_quantity.name: total_reserved_quantity
total_reserved_quantity.comment: The total number of units in Amazon's fulfillment network that are currently being picked, packed, and shipped; or are sidelined for measurement, sampling, or other internal processes.

fulfillable_quantity.name: fulfillable_quantity
fulfillable_quantity.comment: The item quantity that can be picked, packed, and shipped.

fullfillable_quantity.name: fullfillable_quantity
fullfillable_quantity.comment: [DEPRECATED] Typo version of `fulfillable_quantity` kept for backward compatibility. Will be removed in March 2026

total_unfulfillable_quantity.name: total_unfulfillable_quantity
total_unfulfillable_quantity.comment: The total number of units in Amazon's fulfillment network in unsellable condition.

pending_customer_order_quantity.name: pending_customer_order_quantity
pending_customer_order_quantity.comment: The number of units reserved for customer orders.

pending_transshipment_quantity.name: pending_transshipment_quantity
pending_transshipment_quantity.comment: The number of units being transferred from one fulfillment center to another.

fc_processing_quantity.name: fc_processing_quantity
fc_processing_quantity.comment: The number of units that have been sidelined at the fulfillment center for additional processing.

inblound_shipped_quantity.name: inblound_shipped_quantity
inblound_shipped_quantity.comment: [DEPRECATED] Typo version of `inbound_shipped_quantity` kept for backward compatibility. Will be removed in March 2026

inbound_shipped_quantity.name: inbound_shipped_quantity
inbound_shipped_quantity.comment: The number of units in an inbound shipment that you have notified Amazon about and have provided a tracking number.

inbound_receiving_quantity.name: inbound_receiving_quantity
inbound_receiving_quantity.comment: The number of units that have not yet been received at an Amazon fulfillment center for processing, but are part of an inbound shipment with some units that have already been received and processed.

inbound_working_quantity.name: inbound_working_quantity
inbound_working_quantity.comment: The number of units in an inbound shipment for which you have notified Amazon.

warehouse_damaged_quantity.name: warehouse_damaged_quantity
warehouse_damaged_quantity.comment: The number of units in warehouse damaged disposition.

carrier_damaged_quantity.name: carrier_damaged_quantity
carrier_damaged_quantity.comment: The number of units in carrier damaged disposition.

customer_damaged_quantity.name: customer_damaged_quantity
customer_damaged_quantity.comment: The number of units in customer damaged disposition.

defective_quantity.name: defective_quantity
defective_quantity.comment: The number of units in defective disposition.

distributor_damaged_quantity.name: distributor_damaged_quantity
distributor_damaged_quantity.comment: The number of units in distributor damaged disposition.

expired_quantity.name: expired_quantity
expired_quantity.comment: The number of units in expired disposition.

short_term_research_quantity.name: short_term_research_quantity
short_term_research_quantity.comment: The quantity of misplaced or warehouse damaged inventory that is actively being confirmed at Amazon fulfillment center and researched for a duration of 1-10 days.

mid_term_research_quantity.name: mid_term_research_quantity
mid_term_research_quantity.comment: The quantity of misplaced or warehouse damaged inventory that is actively being confirmed at Amazon fulfillment center and researched for a duration of 11-20 days.

long_term_research_quantity.name: long_term_research_quantity
long_term_research_quantity.comment: The quantity of misplaced or warehouse damaged inventory that is actively being confirmed at Amazon fulfillment center and researched for a duration of 21 days or longer.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: amazon_selling_partner__order_items
metadata.comment: Table of single line items of Amazon orders, enhanced with order and catalog item information.

amazon_order_id.name: amazon_order_id
amazon_order_id.comment: An Amazon-defined order identifier, in 3-7-7 format.

order_item_id.name: order_item_id
order_item_id.comment: An Amazon-defined item identifier for the associated item.

asin.name: asin
asin.comment: The item's Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN).

seller_sku.name: seller_sku
seller_sku.comment: The item's seller stock keeping unit (SKU).

product_info_detail_number_of_items.name: product_info_detail_number_of_items
product_info_detail_number_of_items.comment: The total number of items that are included in the ASIN.

scheduled_delivery_start_date.name: scheduled_delivery_start_date
scheduled_delivery_start_date.comment: The start date of the scheduled delivery window in the time zone for the order destination. In ISO 8601 date time format.

scheduled_delivery_end_date.name: scheduled_delivery_end_date
scheduled_delivery_end_date.comment: The end date of the scheduled delivery window in the time zone for the order destination. In ISO 8601 date time format.

quantity_ordered.name: quantity_ordered
quantity_ordered.comment: The number of items in the order.

item_price_amount.name: item_price_amount
item_price_amount.comment: The selling price of the order item. Note that an order item is an item and a quantity. This means that the value of ItemPrice is equal to the selling price of the item multiplied by the quantity ordered. ItemPrice excludes ShippingPrice and GiftWrapPrice.

item_price_currency_code.name: item_price_currency_code
item_price_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `item_price_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

item_tax_amount.name: item_tax_amount
item_tax_amount.comment: The tax on the item price.

item_tax_currency_code.name: item_tax_currency_code
item_tax_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `item_tax_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

shipping_discount_amount.name: shipping_discount_amount
shipping_discount_amount.comment: The discount on the shipping price.

shipping_discount_currency_code.name: shipping_discount_currency_code
shipping_discount_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `shipping_discount_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

shipping_discount_tax_amount.name: shipping_discount_tax_amount
shipping_discount_tax_amount.comment: The tax on the discount on the shipping price.

shipping_discount_tax_currency_code.name: shipping_discount_tax_currency_code
shipping_discount_tax_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `shipping_discount_tax_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

shipping_price_currency_code.name: shipping_price_currency_code
shipping_price_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `shipping_price_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

shipping_tax_amount.name: shipping_tax_amount
shipping_tax_amount.comment: The tax on the shipping price.

shipping_tax_currency_code.name: shipping_tax_currency_code
shipping_tax_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `shipping_tax_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

promotion_discount_amount.name: promotion_discount_amount
promotion_discount_amount.comment: The total of all promotional discounts in the offer.

promotion_discount_currency_code.name: promotion_discount_currency_code
promotion_discount_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `promotion_discount_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

promotion_discount_tax_amount.name: promotion_discount_tax_amount
promotion_discount_tax_amount.comment: The tax on the total of all promotional discounts in the offer.

promotion_discount_tax_currency_code.name: promotion_discount_tax_currency_code
promotion_discount_tax_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `promotion_discount_tax_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

condition_id.name: condition_id
condition_id.comment: The condition of the item. Possible values: New, Used, Collectible, Refurbished, Preorder, and Club.

condition_note.name: condition_note
condition_note.comment: The condition of the item, as described by the seller.

condition_subtype_id.name: condition_subtype_id
condition_subtype_id.comment:
The subcondition of the item.

Possible values: New, Mint, Very Good, Good, Acceptable, Poor, Club, OEM, Warranty, Refurbished Warranty, Refurbished, Open Box, Any, and Other.

buyer_requested_cancel_reason.name: buyer_requested_cancel_reason
buyer_requested_cancel_reason.comment: The reason that the buyer requested cancellation.

is_buyer_requested_cancel.name: is_buyer_requested_cancel
is_buyer_requested_cancel.comment: Boolean indicating whether the buyer has requested cancellation.

deemed_reseller_category.name: deemed_reseller_category
deemed_reseller_category.comment:
The category of deemed reseller. This applies to selling partners that are not based in the EU and is used to help them meet the VAT Deemed Reseller tax laws in the EU and UK. 
Either `IOSS` (Import one stop shop. The item being purchased is not held in the EU for shipment) or `UOSS` (Union one stop shop. The item being purchased is held in the EU for shipment).

ioss_number.name: ioss_number
ioss_number.comment: The IOSS number of the marketplace. Sellers shipping to the EU from outside the EU must provide this IOSS number to their carrier when Amazon has collected the VAT on the sale.

is_gift.name: is_gift
is_gift.comment: Boolean that indicates whether the item is a gift.

is_transparency.name: is_transparency
is_transparency.comment:
When true, the ASIN is enrolled in Transparency. The Transparency serial number that you must submit is determined by:

- 1D or 2D Barcode: This has a T logo. Submit either the 29-character alpha-numeric identifier beginning with AZ or ZA, or the 38-character Serialized Global Trade Item Number (SGTIN).
- 2D Barcode SN: Submit the 7- to 20-character serial number barcode, which likely has the prefix SN. The serial number is applied to the same side of the packaging as the GTIN (UPC/EAN/ISBN) barcode.
- QR code SN: Submit the URL that the QR code generates.

is_serial_number_required.name: is_serial_number_required
is_serial_number_required.comment: When true, the product type for this item has a serial number. Only returned for Amazon Easy Ship orders.

store_chain_store_id.name: store_chain_store_id
store_chain_store_id.comment: The store chain store identifier. Linked to a specific store in a store chain.

tax_collection_model.name: tax_collection_model
tax_collection_model.comment: The tax collection model applied to the item. Possible value(s) can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#model).

tax_collection_responsible_party.name: tax_collection_responsible_party
tax_collection_responsible_party.comment: The party responsible for withholding the taxes and remitting them to the taxing authority. Possible value(s) can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#responsibleparty).

order_purchase_date.name: order_purchase_date
order_purchase_date.comment: The date when the order was created.

order_total_amount.name: order_total_amount
order_total_amount.comment: The total charge for this order.

order_total_currency_code.name: order_total_currency_code
order_total_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code in which the order total is measured. In ISO 4217 format.

order_status.name: order_status
order_status.comment: The current order status. Possible values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#orderstatus).

marketplace_id.name: marketplace_id
marketplace_id.comment: The unobfuscated marketplace identifier. Different marketplace values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/marketplace-ids).

order_total_number_of_items_shipped.name: order_total_number_of_items_shipped
order_total_number_of_items_shipped.comment: The number of items shipped for the order.

order_total_number_of_items_unshipped.name: order_total_number_of_items_unshipped
order_total_number_of_items_unshipped.comment: The number of items unshipped for the order.

count_promotions_used.name: count_promotions_used
count_promotions_used.comment: The count of distinct promotions used.

item_name.name: item_name
item_name.comment: Name, or title, associated with an Amazon catalog item.

brand.name: brand
brand.comment: Name of the brand associated with an Amazon catalog item.

color.name: color
color.comment: Name of the color associated with an Amazon catalog item.

size.name: size
size.comment: Name of the size associated with an Amazon catalog item.

style.name: style
style.comment: Name of the style associated with an Amazon catalog item.

product_type.name: product_type
product_type.comment: Name of the product type associated with the Amazon catalog item.

package_quantity.name: package_quantity
package_quantity.comment: Quantity of an Amazon catalog item in one package.

item_classification.name: item_classification
item_classification.comment: Classification type associated with the Amazon catalog item. Possible values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/catalog-items-api-v2022-04-01-reference#itemclassification).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: amazon_selling_partner__orders
metadata.comment: Table of orders placed in Amazon, enhanced with payment method information and order item aggregates.

amazon_order_id.name: amazon_order_id
amazon_order_id.comment: An Amazon-defined order identifier, in 3-7-7 format.

marketplace_id.name: marketplace_id
marketplace_id.comment: The unobfuscated marketplace identifier. Different marketplace values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/marketplace-ids).

replaced_order_id.name: replaced_order_id
replaced_order_id.comment: The order ID value for the order that is being replaced. Returned only if IsReplacementOrder = true.

seller_order_id.name: seller_order_id
seller_order_id.comment: An order identifier that is specified by the seller. Used to select only the orders that match the order identifier. If SellerOrderId is specified, then FulfillmentChannels, OrderStatuses, PaymentMethod, LastUpdatedAfter, LastUpdatedBefore, and BuyerEmail cannot be specified.

buyer_info_purchase_order_number.name: buyer_info_purchase_order_number
buyer_info_purchase_order_number.comment: The purchase order (PO) number entered by the buyer at checkout. Only returned for orders where the buyer entered a PO number at checkout.

purchase_date.name: purchase_date
purchase_date.comment: The date when the order was created.

sales_channel.name: sales_channel
sales_channel.comment: The sales channel for the first item in the order.

order_channel.name: order_channel
order_channel.comment: The order channel for the first item in the order.

order_type.name: order_type
order_type.comment: The order's type. Possible values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#ordertype).

order_status.name: order_status
order_status.comment: The current order status. Possible values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#orderstatus).

payment_method.name: payment_method
payment_method.comment: The payment method for the order. This property is limited to COD and CVS payment methods. Unless you need the specific COD payment information provided by the PaymentExecutionDetailItem object, Amazon recommends using the PaymentMethodDetails table to get payment method information.

order_total_amount.name: order_total_amount
order_total_amount.comment: The total charge for this order.

order_total_currency_code.name: order_total_currency_code
order_total_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code in which the order total is measured. In ISO 4217 format.

promise_response_due_date.name: promise_response_due_date
promise_response_due_date.comment: Indicates the date by which the seller must respond to the buyer with an estimated ship date. Only returned for Sourcing on Demand orders.

last_update_date.name: last_update_date
last_update_date.comment: The date when the order was last updated. Note: LastUpdateDate is returned with an incorrect date for orders that were last updated before 2009-04-01.

latest_delivery_date.name: latest_delivery_date
latest_delivery_date.comment: The end of the time period within which you have committed to fulfill the order. In ISO 8601 date time format. Only returned for seller-fulfilled orders that do not have a PendingAvailability, Pending, or Canceled status.

latest_ship_date.name: latest_ship_date
latest_ship_date.comment: The end of the time period within which you have committed to ship the order. In ISO 8601 date time format. Only returned for seller-fulfilled orders. Note: LatestShipDate might not be returned for orders placed before February 1, 2013.

number_of_items_shipped.name: number_of_items_shipped
number_of_items_shipped.comment: The number of items shipped for the order.

number_of_items_unshipped.name: number_of_items_unshipped
number_of_items_unshipped.comment: The number of items unshipped for the order.

earliest_delivery_date.name: earliest_delivery_date
earliest_delivery_date.comment: The start of the time period within which you have committed to fulfill the order. In ISO 8601 date time format. Only returned for seller-fulfilled orders.

earliest_ship_date.name: earliest_ship_date
earliest_ship_date.comment: The start of the time period within which you have committed to ship the order. In ISO 8601 date time format. Only returned for seller-fulfilled orders. Note: EarliestShipDate might not be returned for orders placed before February 1, 2013.

easy_ship_shipment_status.name: easy_ship_shipment_status
easy_ship_shipment_status.comment: The status of the Amazon Easy Ship order. This property is only included for Amazon Easy Ship orders. Possible values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#easyshipshipmentstatus).

electronic_invoice_status.name: electronic_invoice_status
electronic_invoice_status.comment: The status of the electronic invoice. Only available for Easy Ship orders and orders in the BR marketplace. Possible values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#electronicinvoicestatus).

fulfillment_channel.name: fulfillment_channel
fulfillment_channel.comment: Whether the order was fulfilled by Amazon (AFN) or by the seller (MFN).

fulfillment_supply_source_id.name: fulfillment_supply_source_id
fulfillment_supply_source_id.comment: The sourceId of the location from where you want the order fulfilled.

has_regulated_items.name: has_regulated_items
has_regulated_items.comment: Whether the order contains regulated items which may require additional approval steps before being fulfilled.

is_access_point_order.name: is_access_point_order
is_access_point_order.comment: When true, this order is marked to be delivered to an Access Point. The access location is chosen by the customer. Access Points include Amazon Hub Lockers, Amazon Hub Counters, and pickup points operated by carriers.

is_business_order.name: is_business_order
is_business_order.comment: When true, the order is an Amazon Business order. An Amazon Business order is an order where the buyer is a Verified Business Buyer.

is_estimated_ship_date_set.name: is_estimated_ship_date_set
is_estimated_ship_date_set.comment: When true, the estimated ship date is set for the order. Only returned for Sourcing on Demand orders.

is_global_express_enabled.name: is_global_express_enabled
is_global_express_enabled.comment: When true, the order is a GlobalExpress order.

is_iba.name: is_iba
is_iba.comment: When true, the item within this order was bought and re-sold by Amazon Business EU SARL (ABEU). By buying and instantly re-selling your items, ABEU becomes the seller of record, making your inventory available for sale to customers who would not otherwise purchase from a third-party seller.

is_ispu.name: is_ispu
is_ispu.comment: When true, this order is marked to be picked up from a store rather than delivered.

is_premium_order.name: is_premium_order
is_premium_order.comment: When true, the order has a Premium Shipping Service Level Agreement. For more information about Premium Shipping orders, refer to "Premium Shipping Options" in the Seller Central Help for your marketplace.

is_prime.name: is_prime
is_prime.comment: When true, the order is a seller-fulfilled Amazon Prime order.

is_replacement_order.name: is_replacement_order
is_replacement_order.comment: When true, this is a replacement order.

is_sold_by_ab.name: is_sold_by_ab
is_sold_by_ab.comment: When true, the item within this order was bought and re-sold by Amazon Business EU SARL (ABEU). By buying and instantly re-selling your items, ABEU becomes the seller of record, making your inventory available for sale to customers who would not otherwise purchase from a third-party seller.

shipment_service_level_category.name: shipment_service_level_category
shipment_service_level_category.comment: The shipment service level category for the order. Possible values: Expedited, FreeEconomy, NextDay, Priority, SameDay, SecondDay, Scheduled, and Standard.

automated_shipping_setting_automated_shi.name: automated_shipping_setting_automated_ship_method
automated_shipping_setting_automated_shi.comment: Auto-generated ship method for SSA orders.

seller_sku.name: seller_sku
seller_sku.comment: The item's seller stock keeping unit (SKU).

product_info_detail_number_of_items.name: product_info_detail_number_of_items
product_info_detail_number_of_items.comment: The total number of items that are included in the ASIN.

scheduled_delivery_start_date.name: scheduled_delivery_start_date
scheduled_delivery_start_date.comment: The start date of the scheduled delivery window in the time zone for the order destination. In ISO 8601 date time format.

scheduled_delivery_end_date.name: scheduled_delivery_end_date
scheduled_delivery_end_date.comment: The end date of the scheduled delivery window in the time zone for the order destination. In ISO 8601 date time format.

quantity_ordered.name: quantity_ordered
quantity_ordered.comment: The number of items in the order.

item_price_amount.name: item_price_amount
item_price_amount.comment: The selling price of the order item. Note that an order item is an item and a quantity. This means that the value of ItemPrice is equal to the selling price of the item multiplied by the quantity ordered. ItemPrice excludes ShippingPrice and GiftWrapPrice.

item_price_currency_code.name: item_price_currency_code
item_price_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `item_price_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

item_tax_amount.name: item_tax_amount
item_tax_amount.comment: The tax on the item price.

item_tax_currency_code.name: item_tax_currency_code
item_tax_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `item_tax_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

shipping_discount_amount.name: shipping_discount_amount
shipping_discount_amount.comment: The discount on the shipping price.

shipping_discount_currency_code.name: shipping_discount_currency_code
shipping_discount_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `shipping_discount_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

shipping_discount_tax_amount.name: shipping_discount_tax_amount
shipping_discount_tax_amount.comment: The tax on the discount on the shipping price.

shipping_discount_tax_currency_code.name: shipping_discount_tax_currency_code
shipping_discount_tax_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `shipping_discount_tax_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

shipping_price_currency_code.name: shipping_price_currency_code
shipping_price_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `shipping_price_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

shipping_tax_amount.name: shipping_tax_amount
shipping_tax_amount.comment: The tax on the shipping price.

shipping_tax_currency_code.name: shipping_tax_currency_code
shipping_tax_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `shipping_tax_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

promotion_discount_amount.name: promotion_discount_amount
promotion_discount_amount.comment: The total of all promotional discounts in the offer.

promotion_discount_currency_code.name: promotion_discount_currency_code
promotion_discount_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `promotion_discount_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

promotion_discount_tax_amount.name: promotion_discount_tax_amount
promotion_discount_tax_amount.comment: The tax on the total of all promotional discounts in the offer.

promotion_discount_tax_currency_code.name: promotion_discount_tax_currency_code
promotion_discount_tax_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code that the `promotion_discount_tax_amount` is listed in. In ISO 4217 format.

condition_id.name: condition_id
condition_id.comment: The condition of the item. Possible values: New, Used, Collectible, Refurbished, Preorder, and Club.

condition_note.name: condition_note
condition_note.comment: The condition of the item, as described by the seller.

condition_subtype_id.name: condition_subtype_id
condition_subtype_id.comment:
The subcondition of the item.

Possible values: New, Mint, Very Good, Good, Acceptable, Poor, Club, OEM, Warranty, Refurbished Warranty, Refurbished, Open Box, Any, and Other.

buyer_requested_cancel_reason.name: buyer_requested_cancel_reason
buyer_requested_cancel_reason.comment: The reason that the buyer requested cancellation.

is_buyer_requested_cancel.name: is_buyer_requested_cancel
is_buyer_requested_cancel.comment: Boolean indicating whether the buyer has requested cancellation.

deemed_reseller_category.name: deemed_reseller_category
deemed_reseller_category.comment:
The category of deemed reseller. This applies to selling partners that are not based in the EU and is used to help them meet the VAT Deemed Reseller tax laws in the EU and UK. 
Either `IOSS` (Import one stop shop. The item being purchased is not held in the EU for shipment) or `UOSS` (Union one stop shop. The item being purchased is held in the EU for shipment).

ioss_number.name: ioss_number
ioss_number.comment: The IOSS number of the marketplace. Sellers shipping to the EU from outside the EU must provide this IOSS number to their carrier when Amazon has collected the VAT on the sale.

is_gift.name: is_gift
is_gift.comment: Boolean that indicates whether the item is a gift.

is_transparency.name: is_transparency
is_transparency.comment:
When true, the ASIN is enrolled in Transparency. The Transparency serial number that you must submit is determined by:

- 1D or 2D Barcode: This has a T logo. Submit either the 29-character alpha-numeric identifier beginning with AZ or ZA, or the 38-character Serialized Global Trade Item Number (SGTIN).
- 2D Barcode SN: Submit the 7- to 20-character serial number barcode, which likely has the prefix SN. The serial number is applied to the same side of the packaging as the GTIN (UPC/EAN/ISBN) barcode.
- QR code SN: Submit the URL that the QR code generates.

is_serial_number_required.name: is_serial_number_required
is_serial_number_required.comment: When true, the product type for this item has a serial number. Only returned for Amazon Easy Ship orders.

store_chain_store_id.name: store_chain_store_id
store_chain_store_id.comment: The store chain store identifier. Linked to a specific store in a store chain.

tax_collection_model.name: tax_collection_model
tax_collection_model.comment: The tax collection model applied to the item. Possible value(s) can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#model).

tax_collection_responsible_party.name: tax_collection_responsible_party
tax_collection_responsible_party.comment: The party responsible for withholding the taxes and remitting them to the taxing authority. Possible value(s) can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#responsibleparty).

order_item_id.comment: An Amazon-defined item identifier for the associated item.

promotion_id.name: promotion_id
promotion_id.comment: Promotion identifier provided by the seller when the promotion was created.

amazon_order_id.name: amazon_order_id
amazon_order_id.comment: An Amazon-defined order identifier, in 3-7-7 format.

marketplace_id.name: marketplace_id
marketplace_id.comment: The unobfuscated marketplace identifier. Different marketplace values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/marketplace-ids).

replaced_order_id.name: replaced_order_id
replaced_order_id.comment: The order ID value for the order that is being replaced. Returned only if IsReplacementOrder = true.

seller_order_id.name: seller_order_id
seller_order_id.comment: An order identifier that is specified by the seller. Used to select only the orders that match the order identifier. If SellerOrderId is specified, then FulfillmentChannels, OrderStatuses, PaymentMethod, LastUpdatedAfter, LastUpdatedBefore, and BuyerEmail cannot be specified.

buyer_info_purchase_order_number.name: buyer_info_purchase_order_number
buyer_info_purchase_order_number.comment: The purchase order (PO) number entered by the buyer at checkout. Only returned for orders where the buyer entered a PO number at checkout.

purchase_date.name: purchase_date
purchase_date.comment: The date when the order was created.

sales_channel.name: sales_channel
sales_channel.comment: The sales channel for the first item in the order.

order_channel.name: order_channel
order_channel.comment: The order channel for the first item in the order.

order_type.name: order_type
order_type.comment: The order's type. Possible values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#ordertype).

order_status.name: order_status
order_status.comment: The current order status. Possible values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#orderstatus).

payment_method.name: payment_method
payment_method.comment: The payment method for the order. This property is limited to COD and CVS payment methods. Unless you need the specific COD payment information provided by the PaymentExecutionDetailItem object, Amazon recommends using the PaymentMethodDetails table to get payment method information.

order_total_amount.name: order_total_amount
order_total_amount.comment: The total charge for this order.

order_total_currency_code.name: order_total_currency_code
order_total_currency_code.comment: The three-digit currency code in which the order total is measured. In ISO 4217 format.

promise_response_due_date.name: promise_response_due_date
promise_response_due_date.comment: Indicates the date by which the seller must respond to the buyer with an estimated ship date. Only returned for Sourcing on Demand orders.

last_update_date.name: last_update_date
last_update_date.comment: The date when the order was last updated. Note: LastUpdateDate is returned with an incorrect date for orders that were last updated before 2009-04-01.

latest_delivery_date.name: latest_delivery_date
latest_delivery_date.comment: The end of the time period within which you have committed to fulfill the order. In ISO 8601 date time format. Only returned for seller-fulfilled orders that do not have a PendingAvailability, Pending, or Canceled status.

latest_ship_date.name: latest_ship_date
latest_ship_date.comment: The end of the time period within which you have committed to ship the order. In ISO 8601 date time format. Only returned for seller-fulfilled orders. Note: LatestShipDate might not be returned for orders placed before February 1, 2013.

number_of_items_shipped.name: number_of_items_shipped
number_of_items_shipped.comment: The number of items shipped for the order.

number_of_items_unshipped.name: number_of_items_unshipped
number_of_items_unshipped.comment: The number of items unshipped for the order.

earliest_delivery_date.name: earliest_delivery_date
earliest_delivery_date.comment: The start of the time period within which you have committed to fulfill the order. In ISO 8601 date time format. Only returned for seller-fulfilled orders.

earliest_ship_date.name: earliest_ship_date
earliest_ship_date.comment: The start of the time period within which you have committed to ship the order. In ISO 8601 date time format. Only returned for seller-fulfilled orders. Note: EarliestShipDate might not be returned for orders placed before February 1, 2013.

easy_ship_shipment_status.name: easy_ship_shipment_status
easy_ship_shipment_status.comment: The status of the Amazon Easy Ship order. This property is only included for Amazon Easy Ship orders. Possible values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#easyshipshipmentstatus).

electronic_invoice_status.name: electronic_invoice_status
electronic_invoice_status.comment: The status of the electronic invoice. Only available for Easy Ship orders and orders in the BR marketplace. Possible values can be found [here](https://developer-docs.amazon.com/sp-api/docs/orders-api-v0-reference#electronicinvoicestatus).

fulfillment_channel.name: fulfillment_channel
fulfillment_channel.comment: Whether the order was fulfilled by Amazon (AFN) or by the seller (MFN).

fulfillment_supply_source_id.name: fulfillment_supply_source_id
fulfillment_supply_source_id.comment: The sourceId of the location from where you want the order fulfilled.

has_regulated_items.name: has_regulated_items
has_regulated_items.comment: Whether the order contains regulated items which may require additional approval steps before being fulfilled.

is_access_point_order.name: is_access_point_order
is_access_point_order.comment: When true, this order is marked to be delivered to an Access Point. The access location is chosen by the customer. Access Points include Amazon Hub Lockers, Amazon Hub Counters, and pickup points operated by carriers.

is_business_order.name: is_business_order
is_business_order.comment: When true, the order is an Amazon Business order. An Amazon Business order is an order where the buyer is a Verified Business Buyer.

is_estimated_ship_date_set.name: is_estimated_ship_date_set
is_estimated_ship_date_set.comment: When true, the estimated ship date is set for the order. Only returned for Sourcing on Demand orders.

is_global_express_enabled.name: is_global_express_enabled
is_global_express_enabled.comment: When true, the order is a GlobalExpress order.

is_iba.name: is_iba
is_iba.comment: When true, the item within this order was bought and re-sold by Amazon Business EU SARL (ABEU). By buying and instantly re-selling your items, ABEU becomes the seller of record, making your inventory available for sale to customers who would not otherwise purchase from a third-party seller.

is_ispu.name: is_ispu
is_ispu.comment: When true, this order is marked to be picked up from a store rather than delivered.

is_premium_order.name: is_premium_order
is_premium_order.comment: When true, the order has a Premium Shipping Service Level Agreement. For more information about Premium Shipping orders, refer to "Premium Shipping Options" in the Seller Central Help for your marketplace.

is_prime.name: is_prime
is_prime.comment: When true, the order is a seller-fulfilled Amazon Prime order.

is_replacement_order.name: is_replacement_order
is_replacement_order.comment: When true, this is a replacement order.

is_sold_by_ab.name: is_sold_by_ab
is_sold_by_ab.comment: When true, the item within this order was bought and re-sold by Amazon Business EU SARL (ABEU). By buying and instantly re-selling your items, ABEU becomes the seller of record, making your inventory available for sale to customers who would not otherwise purchase from a third-party seller.

shipment_service_level_category.name: shipment_service_level_category
shipment_service_level_category.comment: The shipment service level category for the order. Possible values: Expedited, FreeEconomy, NextDay, Priority, SameDay, SecondDay, Scheduled, and Standard.

automated_shipping_setting_automated_shi.name: automated_shipping_setting_automated_ship_method
automated_shipping_setting_automated_shi.comment: Auto-generated ship method for SSA orders.

automated_shipping_setting_has_automated.name: automated_shipping_setting_has_automated_shipping_settings
automated_shipping_setting_has_automated.comment: When true, this order has automated shipping settings generated by Amazon. This order could be identified as an SSA order.

default_ship_from_location_address_line_.name: default_ship_from_location_address_line_1
default_ship_from_location_address_line_.comment: Street address of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

default_ship_from_location_address_line_.name: default_ship_from_location_address_line_2
default_ship_from_location_address_line_.comment: Additional street address information of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

default_ship_from_location_address_line_.name: default_ship_from_location_address_line_3
default_ship_from_location_address_line_.comment: Additional street address information of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

default_ship_from_location_address_type.name: default_ship_from_location_address_type
default_ship_from_location_address_type.comment: Address type of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

default_ship_from_location_city.name: default_ship_from_location_city
default_ship_from_location_city.comment: City of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

default_ship_from_location_country_code.name: default_ship_from_location_country_code
default_ship_from_location_country_code.comment: Country code (two-character country code, in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format.) of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

default_ship_from_location_county.name: default_ship_from_location_county
default_ship_from_location_county.comment: County of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

default_ship_from_location_district.name: default_ship_from_location_district
default_ship_from_location_district.comment: District of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

default_ship_from_location_municipality.name: default_ship_from_location_municipality
default_ship_from_location_municipality.comment: Municipality of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

default_ship_from_location_name.name: default_ship_from_location_name
default_ship_from_location_name.comment: Name of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

default_ship_from_location_phone.name: default_ship_from_location_phone
default_ship_from_location_phone.comment:
Associated phone number of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

Note: In some cases, the buyer phone number is suppressed:
a. Phone is suppressed for all AFN (fulfilled by Amazon) orders.
b. Phone is suppressed for the shipped MFN (fulfilled by seller) order when the current date is past the Latest Delivery Date.

default_ship_from_location_postal_code.name: default_ship_from_location_postal_code
default_ship_from_location_postal_code.comment: Postal code of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

default_ship_from_location_state_or_regi.name: default_ship_from_location_state_or_region
default_ship_from_location_state_or_regi.comment: State or region of the recommended location for the seller to ship the items from. It is calculated at checkout. The seller may or may not choose to ship from this location.

shipping_address_address_type.name: shipping_address_address_type
shipping_address_address_type.comment:
Address type of the shipping address for the order.

Note:
1. ShippingAddress is only available for orders with the following status values: Unshipped, PartiallyShipped, Shipped and InvoiceUnconfirmed.
2. The ShippingAddress contains restricted data. Use the Restricted Data Token (RDT) and restricted SPDS roles to access the restricted data in ShippingAddress. For example, Name, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, AddressLine3, Phone, AddressType, and ExtendedFields.

shipping_address_city.name: shipping_address_city
shipping_address_city.comment:
City of the shipping address for the order.

Note:
1. ShippingAddress is only available for orders with the following status values: Unshipped, PartiallyShipped, Shipped and InvoiceUnconfirmed.
2. The ShippingAddress contains restricted data. Use the Restricted Data Token (RDT) and restricted SPDS roles to access the restricted data in ShippingAddress. For example, Name, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, AddressLine3, Phone, AddressType, and ExtendedFields.

shipping_address_country_code.name: shipping_address_country_code
shipping_address_country_code.comment:
Country code (two-character country code, in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format) of the shipping address for the order.

Note:
1. ShippingAddress is only available for orders with the following status values: Unshipped, PartiallyShipped, Shipped and InvoiceUnconfirmed.
2. The ShippingAddress contains restricted data. Use the Restricted Data Token (RDT) and restricted SPDS roles to access the restricted data in ShippingAddress. For example, Name, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, AddressLine3, Phone, AddressType, and ExtendedFields.

shipping_address_county.name: shipping_address_county
shipping_address_county.comment:
County of the shipping address for the order.

Note:
1. ShippingAddress is only available for orders with the following status values: Unshipped, PartiallyShipped, Shipped and InvoiceUnconfirmed.
2. The ShippingAddress contains restricted data. Use the Restricted Data Token (RDT) and restricted SPDS roles to access the restricted data in ShippingAddress. For example, Name, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, AddressLine3, Phone, AddressType, and ExtendedFields.

shipping_address_district.name: shipping_address_district
shipping_address_district.comment:
District of the shipping address for the order.

Note:
1. ShippingAddress is only available for orders with the following status values: Unshipped, PartiallyShipped, Shipped and InvoiceUnconfirmed.
2. The ShippingAddress contains restricted data. Use the Restricted Data Token (RDT) and restricted SPDS roles to access the restricted data in ShippingAddress. For example, Name, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, AddressLine3, Phone, AddressType, and ExtendedFields.

shipping_address_municipality.name: shipping_address_municipality
shipping_address_municipality.comment:
Municipality of the shipping address for the order.

Note:
1. ShippingAddress is only available for orders with the following status values: Unshipped, PartiallyShipped, Shipped and InvoiceUnconfirmed.
2. The ShippingAddress contains restricted data. Use the Restricted Data Token (RDT) and restricted SPDS roles to access the restricted data in ShippingAddress. For example, Name, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, AddressLine3, Phone, AddressType, and ExtendedFields.

shipping_address_postal_code.name: shipping_address_postal_code
shipping_address_postal_code.comment:
Postal code of the shipping address for the order.

Note:
1. ShippingAddress is only available for orders with the following status values: Unshipped, PartiallyShipped, Shipped and InvoiceUnconfirmed.
2. The ShippingAddress contains restricted data. Use the Restricted Data Token (RDT) and restricted SPDS roles to access the restricted data in ShippingAddress. For example, Name, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, AddressLine3, Phone, AddressType, and ExtendedFields.

shipping_address_state_or_region.name: shipping_address_state_or_region
shipping_address_state_or_region.comment:
State or region of the shipping address for the order.

Note:
1. ShippingAddress is only available for orders with the following status values: Unshipped, PartiallyShipped, Shipped and InvoiceUnconfirmed.
2. The ShippingAddress contains restricted data. Use the Restricted Data Token (RDT) and restricted SPDS roles to access the restricted data in ShippingAddress. For example, Name, AddressLine1, AddressLine2, AddressLine3, Phone, AddressType, and ExtendedFields.
